LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARINA PERLS MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COUNSEL'S SUPPORTING DECLARATION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1324(B) BECAUSE IT DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY EXPLAIN WHEN THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THE AMENDMENT WERE DISCOVERED. FURTHER, IN LIGHT OF THE EXISTING TRIAL DATE, THE PROPOSED DEFENDANTS WOULD BE PREJUDICED BY THE AMENDMENT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR 5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITI PROPERTIES I LLC, TROPHY PROPERTIES, VII, LLC, CITI APARTMENTS, INC., CITIFUNDING, INC., THE LEMBI GROUP, FRANK LEMBI, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE OLGA LEMBI RESIDUAL TRUST, AND, WALTER LEMBI, INDIVIDUALLY AS TRUSTEE OF THE WALTER AND LINDA LEMBI FAMILY TRUST MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS DO NOT SET FORTH THE SPECIFIC CAUSES OF ACTION, CLAIMS FOR DAMAGES OR ISSUES OF DUTY IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION AND IN THEIR SEPARATE STATEMENT. (CRC 3.1350.) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE SUSTAINED. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. NO EVIDENCE PRESENTED THAT THE REQUESTED ACCOMMODATION IS UNREASONABLE OR UNDULY BURDENSOME ON DEFENDANTS. NO EVIDENCE SPECIFIED AND NO ARGUMENT PRESENTED REGARDING THE TEN CAUSES OF ACTION CONTAINED IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CITI PROPERTIES I LLC, TROPHY PROPERTIES, VII, LLC, CITI APARTMENTS, INC., CITIFUNDING, INC., THE LEMBI GROUP, FRANK LEMBI, individually and as trustee of the Olga Lembi Residual Trust, and, WALTER LEMBI, individually as trustee of the Walter and Linda Lembi Family Trust MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment/summary adjudication is denied. Defendants do not set forth the specific causes of action, claims for damages or issues of duty in the notice of motion and in their separate statement. (CRC 3.1350.) Plaintiff's objections to evidence sustained. Defendants fail to shift the burden of proof. No evidence presented that the requested accommodation is unreasonable or unduly burdensome on defendants. No evidence specified and no argument presented regarding the ten causes of action contained in plaintiff's first amended complaint. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MARINA PERLS Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied without prejudice. Counsel's supporting declaration does not comply with CRC 3.1324(b) because it does not sufficiently explain when the facts giving rise to the amendment were discovered. Further, in light of the existing trial date, the proposed defendants would be prejudiced by the amendment. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
